# Data Source (hush_confluence_integration)

Use this data source to read information about an existing Hush Security Confluence integration.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Lookup by ID
data "hush_confluence_integration" "by_id" {
  id = "int-abc123"
}

# Lookup by name
data "hush_confluence_integration" "by_name" {
  name = "my-confluence"
}

output "confluence_status" {
  value = data.hush_confluence_integration.by_name.status
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the Confluence integration
- `name` (String) The name of the Confluence integration

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) The description of the Confluence integration
- `org_domain` (String) The Confluence organization domain (e.g., mycompany.atlassian.net)
- `status` (String) The current status of the integration
